notableEvents.label: Josh Jung GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Josh Jung grounds into a double play, third baseman Brendan Donovan to second baseman Cole Young to first baseman Josh Naylor. Joc Pederson out at 2nd. Josh Jung out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: Josh Jung grounds into a double play, third baseman Brendan Donovan to second baseman Cole Young to first baseman Josh Naylor. Joc Pederson out at 2nd. Josh Jung out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Andrew McCutchen pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andrew McCutchen out on a sacrifice fly to right fielder Rob Refsnyder. Wyatt Langford scores.
